nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI as primary drafter of communications
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes when an email needs to be refined in tone, it's run through chatGPT

nodes.label: AI for communication tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI use as time-consuming due to required review
nodes.grounding_span: The time saved by use of AI is minimal

nodes.label: AI as complement to human-centered work
nodes.label_negative: AI as primary means of producing communications
nodes.grounding_span: The AI element is more supplemental to the human work

nodes.label: Authenticity and memory retention in independent drafting
nodes.label_negative: Loss of authenticity and memory when using AI drafts
nodes.grounding_span: I also find myself more likely to remember more fully what communications I've sent out if I've drafted them fully independently

nodes.label: AI output quality and appropriateness
nodes.label_negative: AI output quality independent of human input
nodes.grounding_span: the quality of the output from AI depends on how carefully and comprehensively people are able to instruct it

nodes.label: Effective communication and customer satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: these have to be handled with sensitivity

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it would be faster not to

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: we are still responsible as people for all outgoing communications

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for refactoring
nodes.grounding_span: This was ultimately satisfying because chatGPT quickly produced a reworked version

nodes.label: Concern about careless use of AI without review
nodes.grounding_span: The frustrating thing was that we still had to review it, and we could have used that 'review' time coming up with our own edits that would be more 'authentic'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as memory aid
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to prefer to use it less than most other people on my team

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I imagine we will be using it for billing data validation more

nodes.label: Deliberative and cautious integration — uses AI only when necessary and reviews thoroughly
nodes.grounding_span: AI drafts also have to be reviewed by a person, which takes extra time

nodes.label: Preference for independent cognitive ownership — values memory and authenticity of self-drafted work
nodes.grounding_span: I also find myself more likely to remember more fully what communications I've sent out if I've drafted them fully independently
